ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-07-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JAN-04-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE, A CALIFORNIA INTERINSURANCE EXCHANGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTENKA, MARIA $13,279.24 PRINCIPAL, $715.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,994.24, "INTEREST NOT ALLOWED. IN CASES LIKE THIS, INTEREST IS DISCRETIONARY. THE COURT PREVIOUSLY TOLD PLAINTIFF TO RESUBMIT AN INTEREST DECLARATION. NOW, PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED AN INTEREST DECLARATION BUT PROVES ONLY COMPOUND INTEREST. COMPOUND INTERESTS IS NOT AVAILABLE GIVEN HISTORY AND FACTS. COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO DENY INTEREST, PER JUDGE J. QUINN."
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTENKA, MARIA
